sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 66 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.113/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025 This reference application is pending since 2017 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 15.09.2020, following order was passed: “15.09.2020 No one is attendance on behalf of the applicant, no intimation is received. On the last date of hearing also, no one was in attendance on behalf of the applicant and the matter was adjourned in the interest of justice. Instant Reference Application was filed on 18.01.2017, whereafter, the applicant and the counsel are not remained vigilant to proceed with the matter, however, as an indulgence and last chance, we are adjourning these matters for date to be fixed by the office after two weeks, with the caution that if nobody appears on behalf of the applicant on the next date, instant Reference Application will be dismissed for non- prosecution.” Be that as it may, the applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001.

Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
